Compare & Choose

Honest comparisons and buyer's guides to help you pick the right spreadsheet tool for your work and budget.

Buyer's Guides

  • Best Spreadsheet Software for Small Business (2026)

    For most small businesses, Google Workspace (Sheets) is the best value for collaboration, while Microsoft 365 (Excel) wins for analysis and finance. Zoho and LibreOffice are strong budget picks. Here is how to choose for your team.

  • Excel vs Google Sheets: Which Should You Use in 2026?

    Choose Google Sheets for free, real-time collaboration and anywhere access. Choose Excel for heavy data, advanced analysis, and offline power. Most people are happy with Sheets; power users still need Excel. Here is the honest breakdown.

  • 7 Best Google Sheets Alternatives (Free & Paid)

    The best Google Sheets alternatives are Microsoft Excel for power, Zoho Sheet for a free all-rounder, LibreOffice Calc for offline desktop use, and Airtable or Coda when you have outgrown a plain grid. Here is who each one is best for.
